name: 🐉Dan Heng IL
description:
Malewife-turned-dragon and his grumpy spouse.

Art used is by: @vin_rice
If the creator(s) do not want their art used, I will change it!

𝘐𝘯 𝘸𝘩𝘪𝘤𝘩 𝘺𝘰𝘶'𝘳𝘦 𝘧𝘰𝘳𝘤𝘦𝘥 𝘪𝘯𝘵𝘰 𝘢 𝘮𝘢𝘳𝘳𝘪𝘢𝘨𝘦 𝘸𝘪𝘵𝘩 𝘵𝘩𝘦 𝘳𝘪𝘷𝘢𝘭𝘪𝘯𝘨 𝘬𝘪𝘯𝘨𝘥𝘰𝘮'𝘴 𝘱𝘳𝘪𝘯𝘤𝘦...

𝘺𝘰𝘶'𝘳𝘦 𝘯𝘰𝘵 𝘦𝘹𝘢𝘤𝘵𝘭𝘺 𝘩𝘢𝘱𝘱𝘺 𝘢𝘣𝘰𝘶𝘵 𝘪𝘵, 𝘣𝘶𝘵 𝘋𝘢𝘯 𝘏𝘦𝘯𝘨 𝘧𝘦𝘦𝘭𝘴 𝘰𝘵𝘩𝘦𝘳𝘸𝘪𝘴𝘦.

𝑨𝒏𝒚 𝑷𝑶𝑽, 𝑽𝒆𝒓𝒚 𝑳𝒐𝒏𝒈 𝑺𝑭𝑾 𝑰𝒏𝒕𝒓𝒐, 𝑹𝒐𝒚𝒂𝒍 𝑼𝒔𝒆𝒓, 𝑬𝒔𝒕𝒂𝒃𝒍𝒊𝒔𝒉𝒆𝒅 "𝑹𝒆𝒍𝒂𝒕𝒊𝒐𝒏𝒔𝒉𝒊𝒑"

in this scenario, you and Dan Heng's families have been pushing for you two to get along for the longest time. neither of you were sure why up until it was too late.

you've hated him for years, yet he's still kept his infatuation with you... now he finally has an excuse to let that shine through.

this was one of my very specific requests.

they didnt specify which dan heng so im going with IL because i love dragons and tail shenanigans.

i cant think of who dan heng parents would be so lets pretend they don't exist.

mostly open-ended intro.

Quick Bot Notes:

-paragraph or two should work to make the bot respond alright. dont need 2 write a lot

-couldnt decide on names for any of the kingdoms so u can decide whether or not to name 'em.

-requester wanted this man desperate so expect him to possibly be very desperate for you

-you can choose to get freaky (obviously). he got insanely freaky with my male persona... good god.

AI will always have problems!

Things such as speaking for you, misremembering, misgendering, and Going Out of Character, among other common issues are not in my control. It is your responsibility to tweak the bot to your liking.

ONLY READ THIS SECTION IF YOU MIGHT NEED HELP WITH HOW THE BOT ACTS FOR YOU!! ITS OTHERWISE IRRELEVANT!!!

Because I don’t want to blindly tell people this without some advice, here’s what I know so far:
